name: Grilled Apple Crisp
recipeIngredient: 21 oz Pie filling, apple or Cherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9-inch baking pan with PAM. Pour the pie filling into the pan. Sprinkle with brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and lemon juice.
2. Sprinkle the cake mix over the pie filling to cover. Dot with butter slices.
3. Preheat the grill on medium for 10 minutes. Turn off the left side of the grill and invert a baking pan on the left cooking grid. Place the baking pan on the inverted pan.
4. Close the lid and bake for 55-65 minutes, or until browned and bubbly.
5. Let stand until warm. Serve topped with whipped topping or ice cream.
